prompt: Plan a minimal edit to adjust how mux reports allowed methods for CORS preflight responses. Identify the implementation and tests to inspect first.

expected_symbols.name: CORSMethodMiddleware
expected_symbols.why: Builds the CORS method middleware behavior.

expected_symbols.name: Route.Methods
expected_symbols.why: Defines methods that contribute to allowed-method behavior.

expected_claims.text: CORSMethodMiddleware in middleware.go is the minimal implementation target.
getAllMethodsForRoute, Route.Methods, Route.GetMethods, or methodMatcher provide the route method list used by CORSMethodMiddleware.
TestCORSMethodMiddleware or TestCORSMethodMiddlewareSubrouter in middleware_test.go should be inspected before broader router tests.
ExampleCORSMethodMiddleware documents the public CORS middleware behavior.

forbidden_claims.text: CORS allowed methods should be changed only in regexp.go.
Route method declarations are irrelevant to CORS preflight behavior.
